creator: peter.thoenen@protonmail.com
text:
Update to latest release






--------------060105090201010604040507
Content-Type: text/plain;
 name="tor-devel.diff.txt"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: inline;
 filename="tor-devel.diff.txt"

diff -ruN tor-devel.orig/Makefile tor-devel/Makefile
--- tor-devel.orig/Makefile	2008-01-28 09:08:53.862926481 -0500
+++ tor-devel/Makefile	2008-01-28 09:09:13.667929072 -0500
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	tor
-DISTVERSION=	0.2.0.17-alpha
+DISTVERSION=	0.2.0.18-alpha
 CATEGORIES=	security net
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.torproject.org/dist/ \
 		http://mirror.onionland.org/dist/
diff -ruN tor-devel.orig/distinfo tor-devel/distinfo
--- tor-devel.orig/distinfo	2008-01-28 09:08:53.873926762 -0500
+++ tor-devel/distinfo	2008-01-28 09:09:25.900930752 -0500
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (tor-0.2.0.17-alpha.tar.gz) = 93b1e15742096e384808501665ce2495
-SHA256 (tor-0.2.0.17-alpha.tar.gz) = 7616c1a77da05a1048f4c623a0d253e3bc72e2affeb5b37a2dc1665fad1e840a
-SIZE (tor-0.2.0.17-alpha.tar.gz) = 1512518
+MD5 (tor-0.2.0.18-alpha.tar.gz) = 6a700ed6c2a9e49b07249fd448fc8091
+SHA256 (tor-0.2.0.18-alpha.tar.gz) = 133fae126d257accc2323932cb73eb25bdd2fca4dca9d8867c67aca9cd6c70da
+SIZE (tor-0.2.0.18-alpha.tar.gz) = 1521955
